get.summary:
Returns account platform limits and aggregated usage across spaces.
Required permissions:
- read:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

accountId.description: The identifier of the account (in GUID format).

maxSpaces.description: Platform limit: maximum serverless spaces. 0 = unlimited.

maxCollectionsPerSpace.description: Platform limit: maximum collections per space (copied into each Space.configuration).

platformMaxStorageBytesPerSpace.description: Platform default storage ceiling applied to each new space. 0 = unlimited.

usedSpaces.description:
Aggregated usage across all spaces in the account.
Number of serverless spaces currently used.

usedStorageBytes.description: Total storage used across all spaces, in bytes.

v1AccountQuota.description: AccountQuota represents the serverless platform limits and aggregated usage for an account.

quota.description: The account's platform limits and aggregated usage.

v1GetQuotasResponse.description: GetQuotasResponse is the response message for the GetQuotas method.
